title: azalea × amoena alba
intro: Azalea × amoena alba, also known as the White Amoena Azalea, is a hybrid plant species that belongs to the heath family (Ericaceae) and is a cross between Rhododendron amoenum and Rhododendron alabamense. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial activities. The health benefits of Azalea × amoena alba include its potential to reduce stress and anxiety, improve cardiovascular health, and exhibit antioxidant properties. Herbal preparations of the plant can be made into teas, infusions, or tinctures, and are often used to treat respiratory issues and promote relaxation.
